name: IAM Policies No Full Administrative Privileges
description: Ensures IAM policies do not allow full administrative privileges (Action:* on Resource:*)
query: SELECT p.id, p.policy_name, p.arn FROM aws_iam_policies p JOIN aws_iam_policy_default_versions v ON p.arn = v.policy_arn WHERE v.document_json ILIKE '%"Action": "*"%' AND v.document_json ILIKE '%"Resource": "*"%' AND v.document_json ILIKE '%"Effect": "Allow"%'
remediation: Review and restrict IAM policies. Replace full admin policies with least-privilege permissions specific to required actions and resources.
